subject: kernel: kexec_file: fix error return code of kexec_calculate_store_digests()
notes: 2nd retry after weekly-limit reset probe; pipeline completed end-to-end.
POC verifier-v1 passed on first attempt: OK(F1.acq=4 F1.rel=6 F3.goto=16 F5.ret=3 F2.if=28).

Reused err-1 family query design (3 compositional predicates) but generalized the err-variable name set to {err, ret, rc} since this seed uses `ret` (and the broader error-return-code pattern across the kernel uses all three).

errIsZeroAtGoto needed one refine iteration: iter 1 over-fired on `if (IS_ERR(tfm)) { ret = PTR_ERR(tfm); goto out; }` branches because PTR_ERR(tfm) is a FunctionCall with no constant Value, so the exclusion `a.getRValue().getValue() != "0"` failed to filter it. Iter 2 inverted the logic to `not a.getRValue().getValue() = "0"`, which correctly treats any non-literal-0 assignment (including function-call results) as setting the err variable.

Final.ql fires exactly once on kexec_calculate_store_digests_buggy:83 (the if (!sha_regions) goto out_free_desc; with ret still 0), silent on _fixed (ret = -ENOMEM precedes goto). No FP variants present in POC.
